title: End Update But Kind of Scuffed V2
description: This mod adds some end stuff like leaky chorus fruit, aka a water bucket but different, and also enderite! It has your regular tools and armor but its OP with 8092 durability, this mod also adds 2 mobs! Catty, like a dog but a cat, End Creeper a melee mob!
body:
This mod adds not alot but some cool features, like a new efffect and potion (teleporting)! Theres a new ore called enderite also!!! Its OP since it has 8092 durability, and theres a new enchantment called particle protection! And why not tame a Catty? They are like dogs but cats!
But stay away from the end creeper who does melee damage and runs FAST.
